acceptance_rule: candidate must tie or beat deck_607 on same real-opponent gate
candidate must not regress the Winota matchup
candidate must preserve or improve miracle/topdeck game frequency
candidate must not cut pressure absorption unless replacing same function

tested.learning: High structural score does not beat deck_607 if the shell overfills engine/ramp and loses pressure response.

tested.swap_or_scope: +Aetherflux Reservoir, +Birgi, +Enlightened Tutor, +Gamble, +Past in Flames, +Storm-Kiln Artist; six cuts from 607
tested.learning: Importing the v7 package as a bundle damages deck_607 execution; does not isolate Birgi.
Molecule Man and The Scarlet Witch are protected plan pieces, not easy cuts.
Penance is coherent, but cutting pressure absorption hurt the pressure matchup.
Lower-curve spell payoff did not convert better than the original high-impact finisher.

tested.swap_or_scope: +Birgi, God of Storytelling // Harnfel, Horn of Bounty; -Bender's Waterskin
tested.result: 3W/6L/0S, WR 33.33%, Winota 1W/2L, miracle games 4/9, topdeck games 2/9
tested.learning: Isolated Birgi sidegrade kept structural intent at 100, but reduced miracle games from 8/9 to 4/9 and topdeck games from 3/9 to 2/9 versus the same deck_607 gate. Bender's Waterskin remains protected until a same-function replacement wins.

tested.result: 0W/9L/0S, WR 0.00%, Winota 0W/3L, miracle games 4/9, topdeck games 2/9
tested.learning: Reprieve preserved Molecule Man and the structural intent score, but replacing Tibalt's Trickery removed too much protection/counter leverage. Tibalt's Trickery is now protected until a same-function replacement wins.

tested.result: 4W/5L/0S, WR 44.44%, Winota 1W/2L, miracle games 6/9, topdeck games 1/9
tested.learning: Galvanoth was closer than Reprieve and preserved Molecule Man, but replacing Creative Technique still regressed win rate, Winota, miracle frequency, and topdeck frequency. Creative Technique remains protected until a same-function replacement wins.

tested.result: 3W/6L/0S, WR 33.33%, Winota 0W/3L, miracle games 6/9, topdeck games 2/9
tested.learning: Ghostly Prison improved the Vivi combat-pressure slice, but cutting High Noon collapsed the Winota and Sisay results and reduced miracle/topdeck frequency. High Noon remains protected until a same-function replacement wins.

tested.result: 1W/8L/0S, WR 11.11%, Winota 0W/3L, miracle games 8/9, topdeck games 5/9
tested.learning: Guttersnipe increased topdeck event frequency but did not convert to wins. Replacing Prismari Pianist removed too much board-pressure payoff; Prismari Pianist remains protected until a same-function replacement wins.
